title: encoding: base64/base64url/hex/percent
manager: The standard encodings — base64, base64url, hex, percent/URL — as pinned builtins, so a machine that emits or ingests encoded data agrees byte-for-byte with the rest of the world and with itself across hosts. Encoding is deceptively full of variant edge cases (padding rules, url-safe alphabets); blessing one specified implementation kills the interop bugs that otherwise appear only when two systems that each "do base64" try to talk.
cs: base64/base64url/hex/percent encode+decode; pinned alphabets/padding; operate over bytearray (W6.10); part of the blessed contract-coupled infra.
